code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut has = false
  mut neg = false
  mut val = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(c)
      if c == 45
        has = true
        neg = true
        val = 0
      else if c >= 48 and c <= 57
        if not has
          has = true
          neg = false
          val = 0
        end
        val = val * 10 + (c - 48)
      else
        if has
          if neg
            result = list.push(result, 0 - val)
          else
            result = list.push(result, val)
          end
          has = false
          neg = false
          val = 0
        end
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has
    if neg
      result = list.push(result, 0 - val)
    else
      result = list.push(result, val)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn filter_gt(_ xs: List<Int>, _ t: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = list.len(xs)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match list.get(xs, i)
    when Some(v)
      if v > t
        result = list.push(result, v)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let nums = parse_ints(line1)
let t = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
when Some(n)
  n
when None
  0
end

let filtered = filter_gt(nums, t)

mut out = ""
mut first = true
mut i = 0
let m = list.len(filtered)
while i < m
  match list.get(filtered, i)
  when Some(v)
    if first
      out = "#{v}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println(out)
